note: verify history logging with pos configs
fix survivorship bias: min-games filter now applied to training data only (was previously applied to full dataset before split, leaking future game counts into val/test)
2012+ dataset re-tune: wider backbones (QB [96,48], RB [96], WR [128]), reduced dropout/weight-decay, larger batch sizes
2012+ dataset re-tune: TE with reduced dropout (0.30), weight decay (3e-4), plus EWMA/L5 feature drops
fix total-aux-loss double-counting, softplus->clamp, z-score clipping [-4,4]

QB feature expansion: 5 new features (pass_first_down_rate, rushing_epa_per_carry, rush_first_down_rate, yac_rate, sack_damage_per_dropback), td_points loss weight 2.5->3.0, Huber delta 2.0->3.0, w_total 0.4->0.3, drop trend_targets
added 6 opp defense features
baseline before injury+depth features
added injury practice_status/game_status + depth_chart_rank features
attention NN: lightweight learned-query attention over variable-length game history
attention fine-tune: K/V projections, positional encoding, gated fusion, d_model=48, n_heads=4, TD head=64, attn-specific training params
attention v2: K/V projections + positional encoding + d_model=48 + n_heads=2 + dropout=0.1 + TD head=64 (no gated fusion, standard training params)
attention v3: positional encoding only + attn_dropout=0.05 + d_model=32 + TD head=64 + rushing/receiving first_downs in history
attention v4: positional encoding + K/V projections + attn_dropout=0.05 + d_model=32 + TD head=64 + first_downs in history
FINAL: positional encoding + attn_dropout=0.05 + TD head=64 + first_downs history (no K/V projections)
verify pipeline return dict changes
separate attn static features: drop rolling/EWMA/trend/share from attention NN input to reduce collinearity with learned history
deeper encoder (hidden=48) + 4 attn heads + attn dropout + positional encoding all positions
deeper encoder (hidden=48) + 4 heads + dropout + pos enc + rolling features in attn static input
WR backbone [128,64] + 4 heads + deeper encoder + pos enc + dropout
